hero.headline: Empowering Communities with Islamic Values
hero.subtext: A nonprofit foundation dedicated to education, charity, and community initiatives across Indonesia.

features.headline: A Bridge Between Heritage and Modernity
features.subtext: Markaz Al Hijaz stands as a beacon for those seeking a profound connection to the Islamic sciences while navigating the complexities of the 21st century.
features.pillar1_desc: Knowledge passed down through chains of transmission, ensuring purity of thought and continuity of scholarship.
features.pillar2_desc: Engaging with modern philosophy and social sciences through a traditional lens, cultivating well-rounded scholars.

programs.headline: Diverse Curriculum for the Lifelong Learner
programs.subtext: From foundational Arabic to advanced theological inquiry — a complete journey of knowledge.
programs.p1_desc: A comprehensive four-year journey into the linguistic miracles of the Holy Quran, blending classical grammar with modern pedagogy.
programs.p2_desc: Weekly gatherings for spiritual growth, fellowship, and mentorship in a relaxed and welcoming environment.
programs.p3_desc: On-demand access to our entire library of lectures and structured courses from anywhere in the world.
programs.p4_desc: Connect with leading scholars and academic professionals for personalized guidance on your educational path.

donate.headline: Preserve Sacred Knowledge for Future Generations
donate.subtext: Your contribution helps us provide scholarships, expand our digital infrastructure, and ensure authentic Islamic education remains accessible to all.

footer.description: Yayasan Madinatul Hijaz Jakarta is a nonprofit organization dedicated to serving the community and strengthening Islamic values through meaningful social engagement.
footer.registration_ministry: Ministry of Law and Human Rights of the Republic of Indonesia
